privileged_info_summary: The transfer_student_intake task uses synthetic test data within an OpenSIS test environment. The target student is Zara Hoffman (Female, DOB: August 22, 2007, Grade 11). The task requires creating three courses (CHEM301: Advanced Chemistry/Science/1.0 credits, ENG401: AP English Language/English/1.0 credits, HIST201: US History/Social Studies/0.5 credits) and entering transfer grades for Zara in each course (91, 88, 79 respectively) under assignment name 'Transfer Final Grade'. Scoring: 20 points for student record, 25 for courses, 35 for grade linkage, 20 for correct values; pass threshold is 60 points. Login: admin/Admin@123. All metadata values are internally consistent across task.json, README.md, and verifier.py.
